name: SFSymbolsKit symbol manifest
description: Authoritative mapping of every Apple SFSymbol name to its typed SFSymbolsKit property. Use this to ground SFSymbol usage instead of guessing names. For any symbol, String.SFSymbols.<property> (and UIImage.SFSymbols.<property> / NSImage.SFSymbols.<property> / SFSymbol.<property>) equals the system name.
